title: Magane En Marumagan
desc: Singaram, a loafer, tricks a rich man in a village and gets married to his daughter. When Singaram is accused of killing his enemy, he is forced to flee to Chennai.

title: I Love You Da
desc: A match fixer faces tough competition when a young player decides to fight him and make his country win.

title: AGP
desc: When a person loses her entire family to an accident, it leads her to a disorder along with hallucination and depression.

title: Varalaru
desc: Shivshankar, a person who uses a wheelchair, tries to make his son, Vishnu, aware of his responsibilities but to no avail. Things take a turn for the worse after Vishnu tries to rape a girl.

title: Nageswary
desc: A night before her wedding, Nagaveni and her brother are assaulted and killed by her fiance, Eashwar, and his friends. However, she rises from the dead and sets out to take revenge on them.

title: Parthale Parvasam
desc: Madhava and Simi's marriage comes to an end after she discovers that he has a love child. However, they remain friends and end up finding suitable partners for each other.

title: Kadhale En Kadhale
desc: Kritika loves Rajiv but fails to tell him. He loves Pragati, but she refuses him. A few years later, Rajiv's marriage is fixed and the girl turns out to be Pragati. Then Pragati learns about Kritika

title: Style
desc: Four college friends try to help two lovers get married against the wishes of their parents. The attempts of the youngsters lead to hilarious consequences.

title: Raajakumaran
desc: Both Vaidehi and Selvi, who happen to be Rajakumaran's cousins, are in love with him. When Vaidehi decides to commit suicide, Rajakumaran is left heartbroken.

title: Niyabagal Thalattum
desc: Abhiram meets Nandini and falls for her. But, he has no clue to her whereabouts. While visiting a family friend's house for a wedding, he realises that the bride-to-be is none other than Nandini.

title: Naan Rajavaaga Pogiren
desc: Jeeva, who leads a good life in Himachal Pradesh, learns that he has a lookalike, Raja, who is a boxer in Chennai. Intrigued by the notion, Jeeva sets out on an adventurous journey to find Raja.

title: Mannan
desc: Krishnan's boss Shanti is an autocratic, domineering woman who he constantly defies. Irked and revengeful, she manipulates his paralysed mother and marries him in a bid to control him.

title: Edhyathai Thirudathey
desc: Prakash, who is diagnosed with terminal cancer, and Geethanjali, an equally ill patient, fall in love with each other. However, when she learns about his illness, she decides to move out of his life.

title: Anbe Un Vasam
desc: A boy falls in love with a girl who also reciprocates his feelings. Scared by another love affair going sour, he proposes to her. But, things go wrong when her point of view differs from his.

title: Bharatha Rathana
desc: Nawab, a terrorist, and his men kidnap a foreign delegation that visits India. Captain Bhawani, along with her aides, has to rescue them by any means.

title: Pandiyan
desc: Pandiyan, a police officer, is enraged when his sister's husband dies. In order to find and catch the culprits, he goes undercover

title: Duet
desc: Two musician brothers, Guna and Siva, end up falling in love with Anjali, a choreographer. However, the brothers have a rift when Siva becomes possessive of Anjali.
